Game.Name: Tsuppari Oozumou - Risshinshusse Hen (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Tsuppari Oozumou: Risshin Shussehen ("Shoving Sumo: Success in Career") is a sumo wrestling game and the sequel to Tecmo's Tsuppari Oozumou for the Famicom. The player takes a sumo wrestler, names them and takes them through competitions to build their reputation and standing in the sumo world.A secret code inputted on the main menu allows the player to play as a blonde woman wearing a spare tire around her midriff.Cheat: CheatsInput the following on the title screen.
Game.Notes: Tsuppari Oozumou: Risshin Shussehen ("Shoving Sumo: Success in Career") is a sumo wrestling game and the sequel to Tecmo's Tsuppari Oozumou for the Famicom. The player takes a sumo wrestler, names them and takes them through competitions to build their reputation and standing in the sumo world. A secret code inputted on the main menu allows the player to play as a blonde woman wearing a spare tire around her midriff.
